tasks.label: backend-clean-ports
tasks.command: pkill -f 'cmd/(auth-svc|profile-svc|matching-svc|chat-svc|mobile-bff|api-gateway)' || true; pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:8080 -ti tcp:8081 -ti tcp:9091 -ti tcp:9092 -ti tcp:9093 -ti tcp:9094 -ti tcp:10091 -ti tcp:10092 -ti tcp:10093 -ti tcp:10094); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill -9 $pids; fi; echo CLEAN_DONE

tasks.label: backend-run-all-now
tasks.command: cd backend && make run-all

tasks.label: backend-kill-listeners
tasks.command: lsof -ti tcp:8080,tcp:8081,tcp:9091,tcp:9092,tcp:9093,tcp:9094,tcp:10091,tcp:10092,tcp:10093,tcp:10094 | xargs -r kill -9; pkill -f 'cmd/auth-svc|cmd/profile-svc|cmd/matching-svc|cmd/chat-svc|cmd/mobile-bff|cmd/api-gateway' || true; echo KILLED

tasks.label: probe-supabase-pooler-dns
tasks.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import socket
hosts=[
'aws-0-ap-south-1.pooler.supabase.com',
'aws-0-us-east-1.pooler.supabase.com',
'aws-0-us-west-1.pooler.supabase.com',
'aws-0-eu-west-1.pooler.supabase.com'
]
for h in hosts:

    print(h, socket.gethostbyname(h))
  except Exception as e:
    print(h, 'DNS_ERROR')
PY

tasks.label: detect-supabase-pooler-region
tasks.command:
cd backend && source config/.env && python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, os
regions=[
'ap-south-1','ap-southeast-1','ap-southeast-2','ap-northeast-1','ap-northeast-2',
'eu-west-1','eu-central-1','eu-north-1','us-east-1','us-east-2','us-west-1','us-west-2','sa-east-1'
]
user=os.environ.get('SUPABASE_DB_USER','')
pwd=os.environ.get('SUPABASE_DB_PASSWORD','')
for r in regions:
    host=f'aws-0-{r}.pooler.supabase.com'
    cmd=['/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/bin/psql', f'postgresql://{user}:{pwd}@{host}:6543/postgres?sslmode=require&connect_timeout=3', '-c', 'select 1;']
    p=subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
    out=(p.stderr or '') + (p.stdout or '')
    if 'Tenant or user not found' in out:
        status='tenant_not_found'
    elif 'password authentication failed' in out:
        status='auth_failed_but_tenant_found'
    elif p.returncode==0:
        status='connected'
    else:
        status='other_error'
    print(f'{host} => {status}')
PY

tasks.label: detect-supabase-pooler-region-2
tasks.command: cd backend && source config/.env && for r in us-east-1 us-east-2 us-west-1 us-west-2 eu-central-1 eu-north-1 sa-east-1; do host="aws-0-$r.pooler.supabase.com"; out=$(/opt/homebrew/opt/libpq/bin/psql "postgresql://${SUPABASE_DB_USER}:${SUPABASE_DB_PASSWORD}@${host}:6543/postgres?sslmode=require&connect_timeout=3" -c "select 1;" 2>&1 || true); if echo "$out" | grep -q "Tenant or user not found"; then s=tenant_not_found; elif echo "$out" | grep -q "password authentication failed"; then s=auth_failed_but_tenant_found; elif echo "$out" | grep -q " 1 row"; then s=connected; else s=other_error; fi; echo "$host => $s"; done

tasks.label: api-smoke-migrated-paths
tasks.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, urllib.request, urllib.error, sys

BASE = 'http://localhost:8080/v1'
USER = 'mock-user-001'

results = []

def call(method, path, payload=None, expected=(200,)):
    url = BASE + path
    data = None
    headers = {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
    if payload is not None:
        data = json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, method=method, headers=headers)
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as resp:
            status = resp.status
            body = resp.read().decode('utf-8')
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        status = e.code
        body = e.read().decode('utf-8') if hasattr(e, 'read') else ''
    except Exception as e:
        results.append((f'{method} {path}', False, f'EXCEPTION: {e}'))
        return None

    ok = status in expected
    results.append((f'{method} {path}', ok, f'status={status}'))
    if not ok:
        return None
    try:
        return json.loads(body) if body else {}
    except Exception:
        return {}

# 0) API ready
ready_req = urllib.request.Request('http://localhost:8080/readyz', method='GET')
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(ready_req, timeout=20) as resp:
        results.append(('GET /readyz', resp.status == 200, f'status={resp.status}'))
except Exception as e:
    results.append(('GET /readyz', False, f'EXCEPTION: {e}'))

# 1) Terms agreement (025)
call('GET', f'/users/{USER}/agreements/terms')
call('PATCH', f'/users/{USER}/agreements/terms', {'accepted': True, 'terms_version': 'v2026-03-15'})
agreement = call('GET', f'/users/{USER}/agreements/terms')
if agreement:
    a = agreement.get('agreement', {})
    ok = bool(a.get('accepted')) and str(a.get('terms_version','')).startswith('v2026-03-15')
    results.append(('ASSERT terms persisted', ok, f"accepted={a.get('accepted')} version={a.get('terms_version')}"))

# 2) Master data (023/024)
master = call('GET', '/master-data/preferences')
if master:
    md = master.get('master_data', {})
    countries = md.get('countries') or []
    languages = md.get('languages') or []
    diets = md.get('diet_preferences') or []
    ok = ('India' in countries) and (len(languages) > 0) and (len(diets) > 0)
    results.append(('ASSERT master-data seeded', ok, f'countries={len(countries)} languages={len(languages)} diets={len(diets)}'))

# 3) Daily prompt flow (028)
daily = call('GET', f'/engagement/daily-prompt/{USER}')
prompt_id = None
if daily:
    prompt_id = (((daily.get('daily_prompt') or {}).get('prompt') or {}).get('id'))
    ok = bool(prompt_id)
    results.append(('ASSERT daily prompt id present', ok, f'prompt_id={prompt_id}'))
if prompt_id:
    call('POST', f'/engagement/daily-prompt/{USER}/answer', {'prompt_id': prompt_id, 'answer_text': 'Smoke answer from automated check.'})
    responders = call('GET', f'/engagement/daily-prompt/{USER}/responders?limit=5&offset=0')
    ok = responders is not None and 'pagination' in responders
    results.append(('ASSERT daily responders payload', ok, 'pagination present' if ok else 'missing pagination'))

# 4) Community groups flow (029)
new_group = call('POST', '/engagement/groups', {
    'owner_user_id': USER,
    'name': 'Smoke Group 2026-03-15',
    'city': 'Bengaluru',
    'topic': 'fitness',
    'description': 'Automated smoke test group',
    'visibility': 'public',
    'invitee_user_ids': []
}, expected=(200,201))
if new_group:
    group = new_group.get('group', {})
    gid = group.get('id')
    results.append(('ASSERT group created', bool(gid), f'group_id={gid}'))

listed = call('GET', f'/engagement/groups?user_id={USER}&limit=10')
if listed:
    groups = listed.get('groups', [])
    ok = isinstance(groups, list)
    results.append(('ASSERT groups list returned', ok, f'count={len(groups) if isinstance(groups,list) else -1}'))

invites = call('GET', f'/engagement/group-invites?user_id={USER}&limit=10')
if invites:
    ok = 'invites' in invites
    results.append(('ASSERT group invites returned', ok, 'invites key present' if ok else 'missing invites key'))

# Summary
failed = [r for r in results if not r[1]]
print('\nSMOKE RESULTS')
for name, ok, detail in results:
    print(f"{'PASS' if ok else 'FAIL'} | {name} | {detail}")

if failed:
    print(f"\nFAILED_COUNT={len(failed)}")
    sys.exit(2)
print('\nALL_SMOKE_CHECKS_PASSED')
PY

tasks.command: cd backend && (curl -sS -i -X POST http://localhost:8080/v1/engagement/daily-prompt/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111/answer -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"answer_text":"smoke test answer"}' | head -n 14; echo '---'; curl -sS -i 'http://localhost:8080/v1/engagement/daily-prompt/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111/responders?limit=5&offset=0' | head -n 16)

tasks.label: push-doc-tracking-updates
tasks.command: git add scripts/STATUS_BOARD.md documents/codex/ALN_4_2_PHASE_A_RELEASE_GATE_CHECKLIST_2026-03-03.md documents/codex/ALN_4_2_OWNER_SIGNOFF_PACKET_2026-03-03.md && git commit -m "docs: align status tracking with completed technical work" && git push origin main

tasks.label: push-main-now
tasks.command: git push origin main
